summary_en: Tender offer for Ryomou Systems: 5,200 yen/share, 1,703,447 shares targeted (floor 537,260), ~8.9 billion yen total (Mitsuba ~5.2 billion), May 15–July 8, 2026. Post-acquisition ownership: Mitsuba 80%, Chubu Electric Power 20%. Squeeze-out procedure planned if floor reached but full acquisition not achieved.
title_en: Notice of Commencement of Tender Offer for Ryomou Systems Co., Ltd.
translation_en_brief: Mitsuba Corporation and Chubu Electric Power Company announced the commencement of a tender offer for all outstanding shares of Ryomou Systems Co., Ltd. The offer price is 5,200 yen per share, with a target acquisition of 1,703,447 shares (floor 537,260 shares, no upper limit). The total purchase amount is approximately 8.9 billion yen, of which Mitsuba will fund approximately 5.2 billion yen. The tender offer runs for 39 business days from May 15 to July 8, 2026. Following successful acquisition, Mitsuba will hold 80% voting control and Chubu Electric Power will hold 20%. If the minimum threshold is reached but full acquisition is not achieved, a squeeze-out procedure will be executed to establish the target 80%–20% ownership structure. Financing is from internal funds.
